title: CBRE Unified Asset Intelligence Platform
description: Build a full-stack commercial real estate intelligence dashboard for CBRE. The platform has 5 screens: (1) Portfolio Overview — shows total properties, occupancy rate, NOI, cap rate, and asset value across Office, Retail, and Industrial property types. (2) Predictive Lease Risk Engine — AI-scored tenant table with risk levels (High/Medium/Low), lease expiry countdown, and broker action recommendations. (3) ESG & Carbon Tracker — monthly CO2 emissions chart per building with a 2030 net-zero target line and energy intensity KPIs. (4) Tenant Experience Hub — space utilization heatmap, satisfaction scores, and open maintenance tickets. (5) AI Deal Assistant — chat panel powered by Claude where users ask questions about properties and get instant insights. Data sources: RentCast API (property records, rental estimates, US commercial market data), EIA CBECS dataset (commercial building energy consumption CSV), US Census ACS API (neighborhood demographics), Kaggle Commercial Occupancy Dataset CSV (room-level occupancy sensor data). All data stored in PostgreSQL. A Python ETL scheduler pulls RentCast API every hour to simulate real-time updates. Use React 18 + TypeScript + Recharts, FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL with SQLAlchemy + Alembic, dark mode, CBRE brand color #006A4D.
businessGoal: Showcase CBRE AI-powered CRE platform to leadership — unify portfolio data, predict lease risk, track ESG carbon goals, and deliver AI-driven deal insights in one real-time dashboard backed by live PostgreSQL data
targetUsers: CBRE Brokers, Property Managers, Investors, Executive Leadership

round1.aiDealAssistantScope: RAG over portfolio data + market comparisons + deal recommendations (Arjun's decision per Tarun's delegation)

arjunDecisions.etlScheduler: Python APScheduler or cron — hourly RentCast pull
arjunDecisions.aiScope: RAG over PostgreSQL portfolio data + market context from ingested data + deal recommendation prompts

productBrief.summary: CBRE Unified Asset Intelligence Platform — a 5-screen dark-mode CRE dashboard for US office properties. Ingests data from RentCast API (hourly ETL), EIA CBECS (energy CSV), Census ACS (demographics), and Kaggle (occupancy sensors). Screens: Portfolio Overview (KPI cards + charts), Predictive Lease Risk Engine (AI-scored tenant risk table), ESG & Carbon Tracker (emissions charts with 2030 target), Tenant Experience Hub (heatmap + satisfaction), AI Deal Assistant (Claude-powered chat with RAG over portfolio DB + market insights). Built with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, React 18 + Recharts. CBRE brand #006A4D, dark mode only.

views.name: Portfolio Overview
views.description: KPI cards (total properties, occupancy rate, NOI, cap rate, asset value) + bar/pie charts by property class (A/B/C). Filterable by location, class, date range.

views.name: Predictive Lease Risk Engine
views.description: Sortable tenant table with AI-generated risk scores (High/Medium/Low), lease expiry countdown, DSCR, and broker action recommendations. Risk model based on lease term remaining, tenant financials, market vacancy rates.
views.dataSource: PostgreSQL leases + tenants + RentCast market data

views.name: ESG & Carbon Tracker
views.description: Monthly CO2 emissions line chart per building with 2030 net-zero target line. Energy intensity KPIs (kWh/sqft, CO2/sqft). Building-level drill-down.

views.name: Tenant Experience Hub
views.description: Space utilization heatmap (floor plan grid), satisfaction score gauges, open maintenance ticket list with status. Filterable by building/floor.
views.dataSource: Kaggle Occupancy CSV + PostgreSQL maintenance tickets

views.name: AI Deal Assistant
views.description: Chat panel powered by claude-sonnet-4-6. RAG pipeline: user question → embed → search PostgreSQL portfolio data → Claude generates answer with citations. Supports: property lookups, portfolio analysis, market comparisons from ingested data, deal recommendations, lease negotiation context.
views.dataSource: All PostgreSQL tables via RAG + Claude API

productBrief.llmPipeline: claude-sonnet-4-6 via Anthropic API. Backend builds context from PostgreSQL query results, sends to Claude with system prompt for CRE domain expertise. Streaming responses to frontend via SSE.

techStack.frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Recharts, CSS variables (dark mode), CBRE brand #006A4D
techStack.backend: Python 3.11+, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2.0, Alembic, Pydantic v2
techStack.etl: Python scheduler (APScheduler) — RentCast API hourly, CSV imports on startup
techStack.infra: Docker Compose (local dev), AWS deployment optional

personas: CBRE Broker — needs lease risk alerts and deal insights
Property Manager — monitors occupancy, maintenance, ESG metrics
Investor — portfolio-level KPIs, NOI trends, cap rate analysis
productBrief.mvpScope: All 5 screens functional with seeded data. RentCast ETL running hourly. CSV imports for CBECS and occupancy. AI Deal Assistant with basic RAG. No auth for MVP.
kpis: All 5 screens render with real data
AI Deal Assistant answers portfolio questions accurately
ETL scheduler runs hourly without errors
Dark mode + CBRE branding consistent across all screens
risks: RentCast API rate limits or key issues
Large CSV imports may need chunking
Claude RAG accuracy depends on data quality in PostgreSQL
productBrief.domainSpecificNotes: US office CRE conventions: NOI = Gross Revenue - Operating Expenses. Cap Rate = NOI / Property Value. DSCR = NOI / Debt Service. Class A/B/C classification by age, amenities, location. All financial displays in USD.

vikram.summary: AWS infra: VPC, RDS PostgreSQL 15, ECS Fargate (FastAPI+ETL), ALB, S3+CloudFront, Secrets Manager (Anthropic+RentCast), IAM, ECR. 7 modules under /infra/modules/cbre_*/
questions: Q1: Kiran building Dockerfile.backend+Dockerfile.etl for ECR push?
Q3: RDS instance class? db.t3.micro for dev
Q4: Custom domain+ACM for CloudFront or default domain?

rasool.summary: CBRE migration 0002 delivered. 11 tables aligned to Kiran's ORM models: properties, buildings, tenants, leases, esg_data, occupancy_data, maintenance_tickets, chat_sessions, chat_messages, etl_runs, market_data. 35 indexes. docs/db-schema.md CBRE section appended. Kiran unblocked.

kavya.summary: CBRE Unified Asset Intelligence Platform design tokens + component spec delivered. Dark-mode first with CBRE brand #006A4D. Full token set (colors, typography, spacing, shadows, chart palette). 15 components specced across 5 views: KpiCard, LeaseRiskTable, RiskBadge, CarbonEmissionsChart, EnergyKpiPanel, SpaceHeatmap, SatisfactionGauge, MaintenanceTicketList, AiChatPanel, ChatMessage, TemplateCard, TopBar, SideNav, FilterBar, PageShell. Rohan unblocked.

kiran.summary: CBRE backend: 7 routers (portfolio, leases, esg, tenants, chat, etl, health), 19 endpoints. SSE streaming for AI Deal Assistant via claude-sonnet-4-6 RAG over PostgreSQL. ETL service for RentCast hourly pull. No auth for MVP. Needs Rasool migration 0002 for 11 CBRE tables.
questions: Should the AI Deal Assistant RAG query all tables or a specific subset for performance?
RentCast API key available in SSM or .env for Sprint-01?
